extDescription.message: Chrome shortcuts: simulated split view and tab utilities.

cmd_move_current_tab_left_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab left
Default: Cmd+Left

cmd_move_current_tab_right_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab right
Default: Cmd+Right

cmd_move_current_tab_first_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab to first
Default: Not set

cmd_move_current_tab_last_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab to last
Default: Not set

cmd_unload_current_tab_desc.message:
🗂️ Unload tab from memory
Default: Alt+W

cmd_go_back_page_desc.message:
🧭 Go back to previous page
Default: Alt+Left

cmd_go_forward_page_desc.message:
🧭 Go forward to next page
Default: Alt+Right

cmd_native_split_view_desc.message:
↔️ Native Chrome Split View
Default: Cmd+Option+N

cmd_navigate_last_active_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Navigate to last active tab
Default: Not set

cmd_select_first_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Select first tab
Default: Not set

cmd_select_last_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Select last tab
Default: Not set

cmd_toggle_pin_tab_desc.message:
🗂️ Pin / unpin current tab
Default: Cmd+Shift+P

cmd_toggle_mute_tab_desc.message:
🗂️ Mute / unmute current tab
Default: Not set

cmd_open_chrome_downloads_desc.message:
🌐 Open Chrome Downloads (chrome://downloads)
Default: Not set

cmd_open_extension_shortcuts_desc.message:
🌐 Open Extension Shortcuts (chrome://extensions/shortcuts)
Default: Not set

cmd_open_chrome_help_desc.message:
🌐 Open Chrome Help (chrome://help)
Default: Not set
